title: Sacul (disambiguation)
content:
'''Sacul''' was the surname of at least two people:
*[[Jorg Sacul]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] pilot
*[[Egroeg Sacul]], a patron of [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]]
Two companies (one a division of the other) also use the name:
*[[Sacul Industries Group]]
*[[Sacul Aerospace]]

==See also==
*[[Sakul Ondondanax]], a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] racer from [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]]
{{Disambig}}
